zh.Trefor, Llyn Peninsula, Gwynedd, Wales,: 英國威爾斯尼德特雷弗
zh.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfa是Hwfa ap Iorwerth的女兒，於大約1250年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾。她於大約1271年與Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn在英國威爾斯可爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1280年在她的家鄉享年31歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯福林爾。

zh-hans.Trefor, Llyn Peninsula, Gwynedd, Wales,: 英国威尔斯尼德特雷弗
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfa是Hwfa ap Iorwerth的女儿，于大约1250年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾。她于大约1271年与Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn在英国威尔斯可爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1280年在她的家乡享年31岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯福林爾。

variants.name: Hua
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Minh, Hung, Quang, Cuong, Khanh, Sinh, Tanh, Trung, Thanh, Huy, Ngoc, Phat, Son, Tri.  Chinese Hua, Tuong, Jian, Ming, Wei, Chi, Fang, Cheng, Chin, Dong Keun, Hui, Lei, Li, Min, Phong, Tam, Tinh, Chung, Hoa Kim, Jih, Sa, Sha.
Vietnamese (Hứa): from the Chinese surname 許, see Xu 2.

nameMeanings.name: Margred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfa was born about 1250, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Hwfa ap Iorwerth. She married Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn about 1271, in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1280, in her hometown, at the age of 31, and was buried in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Trefor, Llyn Peninsula, Gwynedd, Wales,: Trevor, Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfa est née environ 1250, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Hwfa ap Iorwerth. Elle a épousé Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn environ 1271, à Clwyd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1280, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfa wurde um 1250 in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Hwfa ap Iorwerth geboren. Sie hat um 1271 in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1280 im Alter von 31 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfa è nata il circa 1250 nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlia di Hwfa ap Iorwerth. Lei sposato Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn circa 1271, nel Clwyd, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1280, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfaは約1250年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアでHwfa ap Iorwerthの娘として生まれた。約1271年にイギリスウェールズクルウイドでIthel Llwyd  ap Bleddynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1280年に故郷で31歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfa(은)는 대략 1250년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 Hwfa ap Iorwerth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1271년 영국 웨일스 클w이드에서 Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 그녀의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfa nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom filha de Hwfa ap Iorwerth. Ela casou-se com Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn aproximadamente 1271, em Clwyd, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1280, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ro.Trefor, Llyn Peninsula, Gwynedd, Wales,: Trevor, Gwynedd, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfa родилась около 1250 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её отца звали Hwfa ap Iorwerth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn около 1271 г. в местности клвид, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1280 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Hwfa nació aproximadamente 1250, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hija de Hwfa ap Iorwerth. Se casó con Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn aproximadamente 1271, en Clwyd, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1280, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
